metadata.description: Cinatra public foundation Claude Code plugin (Apache-2.0). The single authoritative home of the 5 shared environment skills. Tracks the main branch; updates are MANUAL (run `claude plugin marketplace update` + `claude plugin update`).

plugins.name: cinatra-foundation
plugins.description: The 5 shared environment skills (setup, onboarding, cinatra-dev-env, extension-conventions, domain-gotchas) and the dev-tools CLI engine.
